controls.name: Restrict default GITHUB_TOKEN permissions
controls.setting: Settings > Actions > Workflow permissions > Read repository contents only
controls.rationale: Limits blast radius if workflow is compromised

controls.name: Enable secret scanning + push protection
controls.setting: Settings > Security > Secret scanning > Enable push protection
controls.rationale: Blocks PATs and cloud keys from being committed

controls.name: Use OIDC instead of long-lived cloud keys
controls.rationale: Eliminates static AWS/GCP/Azure keys from CI environment variables

controls.name: Require PR review for workflow file changes
controls.rationale: Prevents direct push of malicious workflow files

controls.name: Pin third-party Actions to full commit SHA
